businessOverview: eGain Corporation (NASDAQ: EGAN) is a Sunnyvale, California-based enterprise SaaS company (fiscal year ending June 30) that provides an AI-powered knowledge management platform for customer engagement and contact centers. Its flagship AI Knowledge Hub centralizes fragmented enterprise content and delivers trusted, compliant, real-time answers to both AI agents and human contact-center agents across voice, chat, email, and self-service channels. eGain is repositioning around generative-AI knowledge as 'trusted knowledge infrastructure for AI,' sunsetting its legacy messaging products to focus on its higher-growth AI Knowledge business. In Q3 fiscal 2026 (ended March 31, 2026), total revenue was $22.5M (up 7% YoY) with AI Knowledge Hub ARR of $48.0M, up 26% YoY and representing 64% of total SaaS ARR.
businessModel: eGain sells a cloud-based AI knowledge management and customer-engagement platform to large enterprises, monetized primarily through recurring SaaS subscriptions. SaaS represented roughly 92% of total revenue in FY2025, with the balance from legacy license/support and professional services. Over 87% of annual recurring cloud revenue in FY2025 came from large enterprises (>$1B revenue or government entities). Go-to-market is direct enterprise sales plus partnerships and ecosystem integrations (Cisco/Webex, Amazon Connect/AWS Marketplace, RingCentral and other CCaaS/CRM platforms); one partner is also its single largest customer. The company is sunsetting ~$4.7M of legacy messaging ARR (running off through FY2026, reaching zero by FY2027) to concentrate on the AI Knowledge Hub.
productModel: The core product is the eGain AI Knowledge Hub, a knowledge management platform that connects disparate content sources (SharePoint, CRM knowledge bases, product docs, policies, intranets, legacy systems) and delivers consistent, accurate, governed answers across channels - powering both customer-facing AI/virtual agents and agent-assist for human reps. It is powered by AssistGPT, a generative-AI capability for content creation, curation, and authoring with editorial workflows, plus content-lifecycle governance (create, review, approve, translate, retire; duplicate/conflict/broken-link checks). eGain is recognized by Gartner as a leader in Generative AI Knowledge Apps and added four new products at its eGain Solve London event in Q3 FY2026. Revenue model is SaaS subscription (~92% of revenue), with the AI Knowledge Hub the growth engine: ARR $48.0M in Q3 FY2026, up 26% YoY, 64% of total SaaS ARR.
marketContext: eGain competes in the customer-engagement, knowledge management, and contact-center AI markets, positioned as the trusted knowledge layer (addressing the 'Garbage In, Garbage Out' problem) for enterprise AI deployments and agent assist. It sits among CCaaS/CX and knowledge platforms but differentiates on AI-driven, governed, compliant knowledge for regulated large enterprises. CEO Ashu Roy noted in Q3 FY2026 a meaningful increase in RFP activity driven by growing market awareness of the knowledge-quality problem in AI deployments. Profitability is improving - Q3 FY2026 GAAP gross margin rose to 73% (from 68%) and Adjusted EBITDA reached $3.2M (14% margin) vs. 6% a year prior.
customers: Over 87% of FY2025 annual recurring cloud revenue came from large enterprises (organizations with >$1B revenue or government entities)
Navy Federal Credit Union, Barclays, Vodafone, Virgin Media, Bell Aliant cited among customers
Utility/water and energy clients including Southern Water, Yorkshire Water, Scottish and Southern Energy
Public sector including the State of Washington
Achmea (one of Europe's largest cooperative insurers) - ~21,000 users deployed across contact center + enterprise (Dec 2025)
customerConcentration: Concentration has materially declined but remains a watch item. Per the FY2025 10-K (filed Sept 12, 2025), one customer - which is also a partner - accounted for 16% of total revenue in FY2025 and 18% in FY2024 (down from historically higher single-client dependence). On the balance sheet, three customers accounted for a range of 18%-22% of accounts receivable as of June 30, 2025.
growthDrivers: AI Knowledge Hub momentum: ARR $48.0M in Q3 FY2026, +26% YoY, now 64% of total SaaS ARR - the core growth engine
Generative-AI tailwind: enterprises need trusted, governed knowledge to ground AI agents ('Garbage In, Garbage Out'), driving rising RFP activity and customer expansions
Improving profitability/margin profile: Q3 FY2026 GAAP gross margin 73% (vs 68%), Adjusted EBITDA margin 14% (vs 6%)
Ecosystem/partner channels (Cisco Webex, Amazon Connect/AWS Marketplace, RingCentral, CRM/CCaaS platforms) expanding reach
Gartner leader recognition in Generative AI Knowledge Apps supporting enterprise credibility

Headwinds: legacy messaging sunset (~$4.7M ARR running off through FY2026 to zero by FY2027) depressing headline SaaS growth; single partner/customer still ~16% of revenue; competition from much larger CX/CCaaS vendors

leadership.name: Ashutosh (Ashu) Roy
leadership.title: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer
leadership.background: Co-founder; has led eGain since 1997. Previously founded WhoWhere? Inc and Parsec Technologies. BS Computer Science (IIT New Delhi), MS Computer Science (Johns Hopkins), MBA (Stanford).

leadership.name: Eric Smit
leadership.title: Chief Financial Officer
leadership.background: Over 15 years of finance and operations experience; previously Director of Finance at WhoWhere? Inc.

leadership.name: Anand Subramaniam
leadership.title: Senior Vice President, Marketing
leadership.background: 15 years of high-tech marketing leadership; formerly VP of Marketing at Yube Inc and Informatica.

leadership.name: JC Rao
leadership.title: Senior Vice President, Products and Services
leadership.background: Joined eGain in 1999; progressed through product engineering, management, and customer success roles.

leadership.name: Vishal Nehru
leadership.title: Senior Vice President, Worldwide Sales and Customer Success
leadership.background: Over two decades of leadership in strategic sales, customer success, and professional services.
